summary: Azure Blob Storage SAS URL migration testing completed successfully. All 11 tests passed, confirming that all API endpoints return Azure SAS URLs instead of base64 data for photos and logos.
critical_code_review_comments: Login endpoint (auth.py:164-181) correctly resolves photo_profil_blob_name to SAS URL
/auth/me endpoint (auth.py:247-250) correctly resolves photo_profil_blob_name to SAS URL
Users list endpoint (personnel.py:131-136) correctly resolves photo_profil_blob_name and signature_blob_name to SAS URLs
Personnalisation endpoint (personnalisation.py:64-68) correctly resolves logo_blob_name to SAS URL
Public branding endpoint (personnalisation.py:43-47) correctly resolves logo_blob_name to SAS URL
Prevention batiments endpoint (prevention.py:110-129) correctly uses _refresh_sas_urls helper to resolve photo_blob_name to SAS URLs
No base64 data (data:image) found in any API response - migration complete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Azure Blob Storage SAS URL migration verified. All endpoints return Azure SAS URLs (https://profiremanagerdata.blob.core.windows.net/fichiers-clients/...) instead of base64 data. Key verified endpoints: (1) POST /api/demo/auth/login - photo_profil is SAS URL. (2) GET /api/demo/auth/me - photo_profil is SAS URL. (3) GET /api/demo/users - all photo_profil are SAS URLs. (4) GET /api/demo/personnalisation - logo_url is SAS URL. (5) GET /api/demo/public/branding - logo_url is SAS URL. (6) GET /api/demo/prevention/batiments - photo_url is SAS URL for batiments with photos. No base64 data found in any response.
